skills.name: write-a-prd

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Use when investigating a reproducible bug, failing test, or runtime error. Prevents random trial-and-error.

skills.name: design-system-architect
skills.description: Generate and maintain design systems with token governance, page overrides, and adaptive source routing.

skills.name: triage-issue
skills.description: Investigate a bug by exploring the codebase, identify root cause, and file a GitHub issue with a TDD-based fix plan. Use when user reports a bug, wants to file an issue, mentions "triage", or wants to investigate and plan a fix.

skills.name: telegram-bot
skills.description: Develop Telegram Bots using aiogram 3.x patterns

skills.name: prd-to-plan
skills.description: Turn a PRD into a multi-phase implementation plan using tracer-bullet vertical slices. Use when user has a PRD and wants an implementation plan, or mentions "turn PRD into plan".

skills.name: ubiquitous-language
skills.description: Extract a DDD-style ubiquitous language glossary from the current conversation, flagging ambiguities and proposing canonical terms. Use when user wants to define domain terms, build a glossary, harden terminology, or mentions "domain model", "DDD", "ubiquitous language".

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Use when you have multiple independent tasks (e.g. creating 5 separate component files) to speed up execution.

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Use when development is complete and verified. Merges worktree changes back to main branch.

skills.name: visual-intelligence
skills.description: Extract design DNA, trends, and aesthetic parameters from visual sources (Pinterest) using Perplexity Sonar Pro.

skills.name: git-guardrails
skills.description: Set up Claude Code hooks to block dangerous git commands before they execute. Use when setting up a new project, hardening CI safety, or user mentions "git guardrails", "protect from force push", "block dangerous git".

skills.description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

workflows.name: error-healing
workflows.description: Systematic debugging workflow for failures and regressions.

workflows.name: explore
workflows.description: 深度探索复杂问题，通过"向外搜索 + 向内发散"双向螺旋产出结构化洞察，适用于技术调研、方案选型和头脑风暴。

workflows.name: drift-validator
workflows.description: Validate that configs, runtime state, docs, and validators still agree.

workflows.name: infa
workflows.description: Show system information and available workflows.

workflows.name: repo-memory-refresh
workflows.description: Refresh repository memory before planning or execution.

workflows.name: triage
workflows.description: Classify incoming tasks by type, complexity, risk, and required gates.

workflows.name: self-learning-retro
workflows.description: Retrospective loop for extracting reliable process improvements.

workflows.name: change
workflows.description: 处理微调级变更请求，通过 7 问题法严格评估，仅允许修改已有任务的细节，禁止创建新任务或添加新功能。需要新任务时引导用户运行 /genesis。

workflows.name: challenge
workflows.description: 对项目决策进行系统性挑战，通过三维度审查框架（系统设计、运行模拟、工程实现）深度分析，用证据证明风险真实存在，产出分级问题清单。

workflows.name: genesis
workflows.description: 从 0 到代码的项目启动全流程，将模糊想法转化为清晰的 PRD、架构文档和 ADR，适用于新项目立项、重大功能重构或架构升级。

workflows.name: project-bootstrap-guided
workflows.description: Guided project bootstrap with checkpoints and validation.

workflows.name: build-memory-capture
workflows.description: Capture durable lessons after a completed task.

workflows.name: kilo-mode-routing
workflows.description: Role-based planning, coding, debugging, and review flow.

workflows.name: craft
workflows.description: 创建高质量的工作流、技能和提示词，融合行业最佳实践与实战经验，提供 Workflow/Skill/Prompt 三种模式的标准框架。

workflows.name: session-memory
workflows.description: Управление памятью сессии — запись контекста при старте и сохранение summary перед сжатием. Предотвращает деградацию точности при "Session compressed N times".

workflows.name: swarm-review
workflows.description: Final review gate for multi-file or C3+ changes.

workflows.name: multi-agent-routing
workflows.description: Standard multi-agent routing for complex execution.

workflows.name: swarm-plan
workflows.description: Plan coordinated multi-agent or multi-lane execution.

workflows.name: multi-agent-routing-v3-free-first
workflows.description: Free-first multi-agent routing with premium escalation gates.

workflows.name: design-system
workflows.description: 为单个系统设计详细的技术文档，通过调研最佳实践和深度思考产出完整的 System Design，包含架构图、接口设计和 Trade-offs 讨论。

workflows.name: axel
workflows.description: Architecture-first execution flow for high-uncertainty changes.

workflows.name: ai-bot-kb
workflows.description: Knowledge-base workflow for AI bot and RAG systems.

workflows.name: task-blueprint-selection
workflows.description: Select the best local implementation blueprint for the task.

workflows.name: scout
workflows.description: 探测系统风险、隐藏耦合和"改了就炸"的暗坑，通过 Git 热点分析和 Gap Analysis 产出风险报告，适用于接手遗留项目或重大变更前。

workflows.name: polyglot-autoevo-routing
workflows.description: Route multi-language work across bounded lanes.

workflows.name: blueprint
workflows.description: 将架构设计拆解为可执行的 WBS 任务清单，每个任务带验收标准和验证说明，生成 Mermaid 依赖图，前提是已完成 /genesis。

workflows.name: ralph-loop
workflows.description: Bounded evolutionary optimization loop.
